import { expect, test } from "vitest"; import * as z from "zod/v4-mini"; test("no locale by default", () => { const result = z.safeParse(z.string(), 12); expect(result.success).toEqual(false); expect(result.error!.issues.length).toEqual(1); expect(result.error!.issues[0].message).toEqual("Invalid input"); }); test("error inheritance", () => { const e1 = z.string().safeParse(123).error!; expect(e1).toBeInstanceOf(z.core.$ZodError); // expect(e1).not.toBeInstanceOf(Error); try { z.string().parse(123); } catch (e2) { expect(e2).toBeInstanceOf(z.core.$ZodRealError); expect(e2).toBeInstanceOf(Error); } });
